01-current-wiring-and-state-machines.md 02-priority-roadmap.md 03-execution-workpacks.md README.md

Backend ↔ Frontend ↔ Database Maintainability Plan Pack

These docs are a focused maintainability pack for the controller, frontend, and persistence layer.

Documents

  1. 01-current-wiring-and-state-machines.md
  2. End-to-end wiring map from UI to controller to DB.

  3. State machines for model switch, chat run streaming, and frontend event sync.

  4. 02-priority-roadmap.md

  5. Priority-ranked actions (P0/P1/P2) to reduce complexity and drift.

  6. Concrete deliverables and measurable success criteria.

  7. 03-execution-workpacks.md

  8. Sprint-style workpacks with scope, tasks, tests, and outputs.
  9. Designed for parallel execution without losing system coherence.
